executives.name: Abby Khandelwal
executives.background: Mr. Khandelwal joined B2Gold in 2024 as Chief Financial Officer. He previously served as CFO of Pretium Resources Inc.

executives.name: Janice Stairs
executives.background: Ms. Stairs is a lawyer with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. She is currently the Chair of the Board of Trilogy Metals Inc.

executives.name: Robert Atkinson
executives.background: Mr. Atkinson has over 35 years of experience in the investment industry. He was previously the President and CEO of Loewen, Ondaatje, McCutcheon & Co. Ltd.
